description_long: This is a medium-sized, woven picnic basket with a cylindrical body and two looped handles attached at the rim. The basket features a gradient color scheme, transitioning from a light teal at the top to a deep purple at the base, with a pixelated, geometric pattern. The weave is tight and uniform, suggesting durability and a traditional hand-crafted technique. The handles are made from the same woven material as the body, providing a cohesive look and sturdy grip. The interior is spacious and open, suitable for carrying food, drinks, or personal items. There is no visible lid or closure mechanism, leaving the contents easily accessible.
description: A woven picnic basket with a teal-to-purple gradient and two looped handles, featuring a tight, geometric weave and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basket's wide opening, both handles, and the gradient weave pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the basket's cylindrical shape and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the open top and gradient pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the cylindrical form and handle placement.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, looped handles made from braided woven plastic, attached at the rim.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave with a pixelated geometric gradient pattern.
